# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Welcome to DAX, your ultimate destination for stunning furniture collections. Browse curated styles, unbeatable black friday deals store offers, and transform your home today.

### Inspiration
https://example.com/inspiration
Unlock stunning interior design ideas at DAX. Discover room setups, style guides, and curated looks that help home buyers and design enthusiasts create spaces they love.

### About
https://example.com/about
DAX is more than a used furniture store — it&#39;s a movement. Learn our story, our mission, and why thousands of design lovers trust DAX for quality, style, and value.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Have questions about black friday deals store offers or need styling advice? Reach out to the DAX team today — we&#39;re here to guide every step of your furniture journey.

### Products
https://example.com/products
Our Products - DAX

### Product Detail
https://example.com/product/:slug
Product Details - DAX

### Category
https://example.com/category/:slug
Products - DAX
